name: FDA / US — Assistive & Wearable Robotics
key_guidance_documents: FDA Guidance: Factors to Consider When Making Benefit-Risk Determinations in Medical Device Premarket Approval
FDA Guidance: De Novo Classification Process
FDA Guidance: Software as a Medical Device (SaMD)
FDA 21 CFR Part 820: Quality System Regulation
notes: Most powered exoskeletons intended for rehabilitation are classified as Class II (510(k) required)
Devices for home use by non-clinicians may face additional scrutiny
Cybersecurity considerations apply if device has wireless connectivity
Biocompatibility testing required for skin-contact components (ISO 10993)
